nasb.text: In the seventeenth year of Pekah the son of Remaliah, Ahaz the son of Jotham, king of Judah, became king.

esv.text: In the seventeenth year of Pekah the son of Remaliah, Ahaz the son of Jotham, king of Judah, began to reign.

cnv.text: 利瑪利的兒子比加在位第十七年，猶大王約坦的兒子亞哈斯登基作王。

ccb.text: 利玛利的儿子比加执政第十七年，犹大王约坦的儿子亚哈斯登基。
